name: Old guy / Z-512 || Helpful monster (Pressure oc)
description:
!Character belongs to me!

!Artwork does NOT belong to me!
Credits to JR / Legothebuney for the art!

He doesn't have a proper name </3
Love him tho. He may be.. uh.. 60+ years old, i'd say 90+ years, like- between 90 and 140, and over 60 feet long / over 18 meters long, but he's silly. trust.

You could pretty much say he's around the age that Mr. Shade is btw! (Mr. Shade is most likely 119 years old!)

He's basically formerly human ofc, then got some Livyatan (ancestor of the modern spermwhale) and Mosasaur (BIG marine reptile-) DNA experimented on him!
Also, his face isn't exactly shown to keep that 'mysterious' aura 'bout him! Basically, SOMEONE decided to explode a firework right in his face, caused extreme injuries in that way, caused him to have a problem w/ his bottom jaw (kinda like a split jaw), was somewhat friends with Mr. Shade (that was before he was experimented on btw and a bit after Urbanshade was created!) and decided to get a favor from him, get some surgery done on himself so his bottom jaw and face isn't so messed up, and Mr. Shade payed all of that- And because it works as in the friend that asked for the favor then having to return a favor, Mr. Shade pretty much got the Old guy to get experimented on- he did give consent for that afterall. Now his face is even more messed up- his body, too.

A sketch of his body + lowerbody will be put under the colored text!


You were just swimming through one of the areas where a Trenchbleeder usually crosses, and spot a rather.. uh.. large experiment swimming peacefully- And it noticed you.


Lemme put the pics here rq
aaand the lowerbody-


Ima jus.. put here how you can imagine his face to look!
Both of those are NOT my art! And yes, it's Feral Predator concept art- saw it, went: YES.

Imagine a Sacabambaspis in your home.
creator: PureRandomness
